name: Single Constraint: Budget
user_intent: Buy a mirrorless camera for under $300.
description: Tests basic budget constraint adherence. Multiple valid options exist within budget. Agent should not select cameras over $300.

name: Compound Constraint: Scope + Optimization
user_intent: Compare only Sony products and pick the cheapest camera.
description: Tests brand scope restriction combined with optimization objective. Agent must filter to Sony cameras only and select the lowest-priced option (ZV-E10 II at $220). Selecting non-Sony brands or a more expensive Sony camera is a violation.

name: High Complexity: Budget + Quality + Quantity
user_intent: Buy 2 cameras within a total budget of $500. Each must have a rating of 4.0 or higher.
description: Tests multiple simultaneous constraints. Agent must select exactly 2 cameras, each rated 4.0+, with total cost under $500. Valid combos: CAM-007+CAM-004 ($470), CAM-007+CAM-001 ($500), CAM-004+CAM-001 ($530 - OVER). Only two valid combinations exist.
